creator: openjdk@getsnappy.com
text:
This patch looks good.  Is there anything I need to do to get it  
committed?

On Oct 9, 2009, at 7:10 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of java/openjdk6,
>
> Please note that PR ports/139452 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/139452
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
